ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_group" TEXT /* Group the device belongs to */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each device */,
  "device_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "device_mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "device_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_group FOREIGN KEY ("device_group") REFERENCES device_groups ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the template */,
  "template_version" TEXT /* Version number of the template */,
  "template_created_by" TEXT /* User who created the template */,
  "template_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was created */,
  "template_last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the template */,
  "template_last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_template_type FOREIGN KEY ("template_type") REFERENCES template_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_templates" (
  "device_template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-template assignment */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the template assignment */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_templates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_templates_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "device_template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device-template assignment */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the template was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User who assigned the template */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the assignment */,
  "assignment_compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_assignments_device_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_template_id") REFERENCES device_templates ("device_template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the group */,
  "group_status" TEXT /* Status of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the template type */,
  "type_compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility with device models */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_settings_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the change */,
  "log_user" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log entry */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_log_user FOREIGN KEY ("log_user") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
column_names: Unique serial number for each device
Date when the template was created
User who last updated the template
Date when the template was last updated
Unique identifier for each device-template assignment
Notes or comments about the assignment
